case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. DAVID PAK AKA HUI CHOL PAK AND ITS SUCCESSORS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT PAK, DAVID AKA HUI CHOL PAK AND ITS SUCCESSORS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAK, DAVID AKA HUI CHOL PAK AND ITS SUCCESSORS $19,550.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,017.67 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,937.67, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
